description: Settlement of a marital dispute. Made after problems between [...] bt. Shabbetay and her husband Ṣedaqa. Written and signed by Ḥalfon b. Menashshe, and also signed by Natan b. Shelomo ha-Kohen. Dated: Av 1446 of the Seleucid Era (= 1135 CE). (Information from CUDL; see also Goitein's attached notes.)
description_he: הסדר סכסוך זוגי. נעשה בין [...] בת שבתאי לבעלה צדקה. כתוב וחתום על ידי חלפון ב. מנשה. תאריך: אב 1446 סלאוקי = 1135 לספירה
